response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack engineering experience and demonstrable technical depth across languages and systems, including AI-agent infrastructure work and open-source contributions, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or the 15-year technical leadership trajectory required for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Broad technical fluency across languages and domains including DLang, Node.js, and cloud tooling
Active open-source contributions with real-world impact (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Recent direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
concerns: No demonstrable AI/ML product or platform built from end-to-end
Lack of documented cloud architecture strategy or customer advisory experience
Career timeline shows frequent role changes with no clear director-level leadership trajectory
